description: Complete and freeze the OSF Preregistration record without publishing papers.

gates.evidence: Pinned osf-cli-go v1.0.0 authenticated in Chrome-assisted workflow.
The accountable owner approved the exact protocol and manifest digests in data/osf_review/registration_decision.json; stale decisions fail closed.

Approved registration gqk4z was submitted by GitHub Actions run 30010023356 after 11 records passed remote SHA-256 verification. OSF reports pending_registration_approval=true; no active remote snapshot is recorded until confirmation. Papers and preprints remain excluded.
